title: NenProject
$comment: Last modified on 2026-02-23 by Hans Bot - NEN. Derived from 'NEN Content Publication V0.8.1-bundled.yaml'. Internal reference: https://nendelft.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/Normenbank/pages/135495682/NenProjects

nenProjectId.description: Unique identifier for the NEN project.

nenProjectReference.description: Reference code or name for the NEN project.

nenProjectURN.description: URN for the NEN project, following a specific format. Internal reference: https://nendelft.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/Normenbank/pages/128057507/nenProjectId.

nenOriginator.description: The acronym or name of an organization, partnership or group of SDOs that orginate a project, standard or publication. See also for NSIO: https://www.niso-sts.org/TagLibrary/niso-sts-TL-1-0-html/element/originator.html. Open-ended list of values. Representation: Acronym.

nenOrigine.description: The acronym or name of an organization, partnership or group of SDOs that orginate a project, standard or publication. See also for NSIO: https://www.niso-sts.org/TagLibrary/niso-sts-TL-1-0-html/element/originator.html. Open-ended list of values. Representation: Acronym.

nenEmbargoUntil.$comment: Internal reference https://nendelft.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/Normenbank/pages/174915681/nenEmbargo. Renamed 'EmbargoUntil' for clarity. This property indicates the date and time until which the project is under embargo, meaning that information about the project should not be made public or accessible until that time. This can be used to control the release of information about the project, especially if it is still in development or if there are confidentiality concerns. The value should be in ISO 8601 date-time format (e.g., 2026-12-31T23:59:59Z) to ensure consistency and proper handling of time zones.
nenEmbargoUntil.description: The date and time conform https://www.iso8601.com until which the project is under embargo. After this date, the project may be made public or accessible according to the organization's policies. This can be used to control the release of information about the project, especially if it is still in development or if there are confidentiality concerns. Representation: ISO 8601 date-time format (e.g., 2026-12-31T23:59:59Z).

lastChangedAt.description: Timestamp for most recent update. Cannot be a date in the future.

notFutureDate.description: lastChangeTimestamp cannot be a date in the future.

nenMainTitles.description: Array of main title objects for the NEN project. Each main title object can contain properties such as 'title' and 'language'.

title.description: The main title of the NEN project.
examples: NEN-EN 12625-3:1996 - Textiel - Bepaling van de absorptie van water - Deel 3: Absorptie van water door onderdompeling

nenTitleSource.description: The source from which the title was derived, such as 'NEN', 'ISO', 'CEN', etc.

nenStages.description: Array of stage objects for the NEN project. Each stage object can contain properties such as 'stageCode', 'stageDueDate', 'stageEffectiveDate', and 'stageStatus'.

nenStageCode.description: The stage code of the project, which indicates the stage of the project in its lifecycle.

nenStageStatus.description: nenStageStatus allows to identify current (=today’s) status of each stage code.

nenStageTargetDate.description: nenStageTargetDate indicates the short-term planned date when the stage is expected to become CURRENT in the future.

notPastDate.description: nenStageEffectiveDate cannot be a date in the past.

nenStageDueDate.description: The target date for the current stage of the project. This indicates when the project is expected to reach a specific milestone or when it is expected to move to the next stage.

nenStageEffectiveDate.description: nenStageEffectiveDate describes when the stage was effectivey reached

notFutureDate.description: nenStageEffectiveDate cannot be a date in the future.

nenPublicationUri.$comment: HBO: this seems the right location for an optional reference to the publication version produced in this stage of the project
nenPublicationUri.description: Reference to the resource location of the publication version

items.$comment: Discussion. Logically, conform the description, only oneOf targetDate, dueDate and effectiveDate can be given at any point in time. At least, when effectiveDate is given, the others are no longer relevant. The projects service should be able to guarantee consistency

nenAbstracts.description: Array of abstract objects for the NEN project. Each abstract object can contain properties such as 'abstract' and 'language'.

nenAbstract.description: The abstract or summary of the NEN project describing its scope.
examples: This project focuses on the development of a new standard for water absorption testing of textiles, which will provide more accurate and reliable results compared to existing methods.

references.description: Array of reference objects related to the NEN project. Prefer an array over '&' delimited strings for better structure and validation. Each reference object can contain properties such as 'reference', 'stdNumber', and 'nenCommitteeDisplayName'.

projectId.$comment: can be used as path parameter in link definition in the API

familyId.$comment: to be replaced with the definition in the family schema

isoCalendarDate.description: A standard ISO calendar date in the European format (YYYY-MM-DD).

isoDateTimeExt.description: A date and time in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ).

sdo.description: Organisation involved in the creation of the standard text.

stdPartNumber.$comment: copied from 'cen-publications.yaml'. Unclear if this should go into references or be a separate property. For now, keeping it as a separate property for clarity, but it could be moved into the references array if it is considered a type of reference.
stdPartNumber.description: project's standard or document part 'number', which may also contain non-numeric characters, e.g. '2B'

harmonizedStageCode.description: harmonizedStageCode (i.e. 60.60) cannot be used with stageCode. This will match any 'CURRENT' stage, not a 'CLOSED' stage.

stageCode.description: stageCode (i.e. 6060) cannot be used with harmonizedStageCode

nenCommitteeUrn.description: URN for the NEN committee associated with the project, following a specific format (i.e. committeeUrn=iso:committee:54158&committeeUrn=iso:committee:48138&committeeUrn=iso:committee:4559).
nenCommitteeUrn.$comment: to be redefined as array. copied from 'cen-publications.yaml'. pattern not consistent with description. Also, relation in metamodel is to nenFamily, not nenProject.
